---
title: "European History: Narrated in a series of Historical Selections from the Best Authorities 2 vols. Selected and arranged by E.M. Sewell and C.M. Yonge"
---

## European History: Narrated in a series of Historical Selections from the Best Authorities 2 vols. Selected and arranged by E.M. Sewell and C.M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1870
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history (by others)
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Co.

### Notes

The first volume of this title is a renamed version of <i>Historical Selections: A Series of Readings from the Best Authorities in English and European History </i>(1868).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
